name: 1st Grade Palo Santo Wood Sticks
description: Palo Santo literally means holy wood and is, just as white sage, originate from the native Indians in South America. Centuries ago they already used it during ceremonies to clear the aura and to heal from negative influences. In Europe too, people choose to buy the holy wood to clean their houses or just for the fragrances in its purest form.The fragrance can be described as a warm, wooden and lightly aroma with a sweet touch that sometimes slip trough. In comparison with white sage (that is also used for the same purpose), Palo Santo gives off a very mild odor. We can’t imagine anybody who wouldn’t be charmed by the natural and therefore spiritual smell. Order Palo Santo and purify your customers homes today.The pack contains approximately 138 sticks with length of 8-15 cm and weight 4-11 g.

7 Chakra Colour Ashcatcher
description: 7 Chakra Colour Ashcatcher - a beautiful and functional piece designed to elevate any space. This ashcatcher is perfect for wholesalers, gift shops, or anyone looking to add a touch of spirituality to their product offerings.The 7 Chakra Colour Ashcatcher is made from high-quality materials and features a stunning chakra-inspired design. The seven colourful chakra symbols represent different energy centres in the body and are believed to help balance and align the mind, body, and spirit.This ashcatcher is designed to catch any ash or debris that may fall from burning incense, making it a practical accessory for any incense burner. It helps to keep the burning area clean and free from debris, creating a more enjoyable and calming experience for users.

name: Chakra Ashcatchers - 7 Designs
description: Assorted Colours & Designs Ash catchers, Incense holders. Imported from India. We deal with a number of companies all of which produce wood-wares in the city of Saharanpur in Northern India. This area of India still faces significant infrastructure problems, electricity is intermittent, transport and roads are poor. As a result, supplies are particularly erratic. However the region has a proud artisan history of producing beautiful woodware and we are proud to support this industry by importing several containers a year of wholesale woodware, a favourite of which is the incense holder in so many forms. * sold in single pieces.*For any assorted designs please specify in checkout which design you would prefer.

description: Backflow Incense Burner is specially designed to create smoke that cascades downwards, pouring dramatically down the tower with a stunning effect that will catch your customer's eye.Once you have lit your incense cone, it will begin to smoke, the incense is heavier than air and it will fall dramatically in swirls and twists, through the hole and down over the item, to pool at the bottom. name: Backflow Incense Burner - Pineapple Mountain & Cascade Twin Design
description: Immerse your senses in a tropical paradise with our Pineapple Mountain & Cascade Twin Design Backflow Incense Burner.As you light the backflow incense cone, watch the aromatic smoke cascade down the twin design, resembling a picturesque mountain slope. The pineapple structure adds a touch of exotic charm, creating a visual treat that's both relaxing and visually appealing.Once you have lit your incense cone, it will begin to smoke, the incense is heavier than air and it will fall dramatically in swirls and twists, through the hole and down over the item, to pool at the bottom. It is incredible to watch and very relaxing.Please note: In order to create the smoke cascade effect you will need to use backflow incense cones.

name: Palo Santo Heater - Teak Wood - Hamsa Design

When ignited, the timber releases a unique sweet and earthy fragrance, reputed to possess medicinal and healing virtues. Traditionally employed in ceremonial practices, it is revered for its ability to dispel negative vibes, foster serenity, stimulate inventiveness, and evoke profound tranquility and contentment.Perfect for boutique gift shops and online platforms dedicated to offering incense and holistic wellness merchandise.

name: Lrg Cast Iron Cauldron with Triple Moon 12x15cm
description: A larger, solid cast iron cauldron with a raised Triple Moon symbol on the front and a classic three-leg base for stability. The lid helps control smoke and heat, making it practical for indoor ritual use.Commonly used for burning incense, holding ritual offerings, mixing herbs, or as a focal piece on an altar. The Triple Moon symbol (waxing, full, and waning moon) is often linked to cycles, phases, and feminine energy, which adds context for those using it in spiritual or ritual practices.Because of the material, it will get hot during use and should always be placed on a heat-resistant surface. Over time, the surface may develop a natural patina, which is typical for cast iron and part of its character.
